positive_cases.name: relevant_docs_link
positive_cases.prompt: Validate a link from a partner integration docs page to the exact project page it uses.

positive_cases.name: awesome_list_pr
positive_cases.prompt: Validate an awesome-list opportunity for an OSS tool with clear submission rules.

negative_cases.name: irrelevant_directory
negative_cases.prompt: Approve a generic unrelated directory listing with exact-match anchor text.
